banner.message: Now accepting new patients across Auckland. Call 022 137 0336 to book.

hero.title: Physiotherapy That Comes to You
hero.subtitle: Professional, personalised physiotherapy in the comfort of your own home. Recovering from injury, surgery, or managing a chronic condition — we come to you.

about.heading: About PhysioOnWheels
about.intro: PhysioOnWheels brings qualified physiotherapy directly to your door — no travel, no waiting rooms, just focused one-on-one care in your own home.
paragraphs: Our home-based physiotherapy service was founded on a simple belief: quality care should be accessible to everyone, wherever they are. Whether you're recovering from surgery, managing a long-term condition, or simply finding it difficult to travel to a clinic, we make it easy.

Each session is conducted by a registered physiotherapist who takes the time to understand your specific situation, goals, and home environment. Your treatment plan is designed around your life — not a generic protocol.
about.therapist_bio: Thandeka is a registered physiotherapist with experience across orthopaedic, neurological, and geriatric rehabilitation. Passionate about accessible healthcare, she founded PhysioOnWheels to remove the barriers that prevent people from getting the treatment they need.

services.name: Initial Assessment
services.short: A comprehensive evaluation of your condition, movement, and goals. Forms the foundation of your personalised treatment plan.

services.name: Rehabilitation
services.short: Structured programmes to restore strength, mobility, and function following injury, surgery, or illness.

services.name: Falls Prevention & Balance
services.short: Targeted exercises and assessments to improve balance, reduce fall risk, and maintain independence.

services.name: Pain Management
services.short: Evidence-based strategies to manage chronic or acute pain, including manual therapy and exercise prescription.

services.name: Neurological Rehabilitation
services.short: Specialised therapy for conditions such as stroke, Parkinson's, multiple sclerosis, and other neurological disorders.

services.name: Post-Operative Rehabilitation
services.short: Guided recovery programmes following joint replacements, spinal surgery, or other procedures.

pricing.name: Initial Assessment
pricing.description: Full assessment, diagnosis discussion, and personalised treatment plan

pricing.name: Extended Session
pricing.description: Extended treatment — ideal for complex conditions

pricing.name: Home Exercise Programme
pricing.description: Review and progression of your home exercise programme
